aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.subtitle: Connecting stakeholders, businesses, institutions, and governments to build a strategic industrial bridge between Japan and India.
aboutPage.introPara1: The Japan India Business Bureau (JIBB) is a non-profit organization dedicated to strengthening economic, industrial, and cultural ties between Japan and India. Positioned as a strategic bridge, we enable collaboration by connecting businesses, institutions, and government stakeholders across both ecosystems.
aboutPage.introPara2: With its headquarters in Tokyo, Japan, and an operational presence in Noida, India, JIBB actively facilitates cross-border partnerships, market entry, and long-term industrial cooperation. We support companies in navigating regulatory landscapes, identifying opportunities, and building sustainable business relationships in both countries.
aboutPage.whoWeAreDesc:
JIBB is a cross-border industry facilitation platform that brings together businesses, institutions, and government stakeholders from Japan and India. We are not just a network, but an enabler of meaningful partnerships built on trust, transparency, and long-term vision.

With a strong presence in both Tokyo and Noida, we operate at the intersection of two dynamic economies, helping organizations connect, collaborate, and grow beyond geographical and cultural boundaries. Our strength lies in understanding both ecosystems deeply and translating that understanding into actionable opportunities for our stakeholders.
aboutPage.whatWeDoDesc:
JIBB acts as a catalyst for India–Japan collaboration by creating structured pathways for businesses to engage, expand, and succeed.

We facilitate market entry and expansion by helping companies navigate regulatory frameworks, identify the right partners, and localize their operations effectively. Through curated networking platforms, industry events, and strategic introductions, we enable high-value collaborations and joint ventures.

We also drive knowledge exchange by bringing together industry leaders, policymakers, and innovators to share insights and explore emerging opportunities. From early-stage ideas to large-scale industrial partnerships, JIBB supports the entire journey—enabling innovation, fostering growth, and accelerating global expansion.
aboutPage.whatWeBelieve1Desc: We believe that the future of India–Japan collaboration lies in long-term partnerships built on mutual trust and shared value.
aboutPage.whatWeBelieve2Desc: We believe in bridging not just businesses, but cultures—because true collaboration goes beyond transactions. By fostering deeper understanding and alignment, we help organizations work together more effectively.
aboutPage.whatWeBelieve3Desc: We believe in innovation as a driver of growth, supporting ideas from their inception and enabling them to scale globally.
aboutPage.whatWeBelieve4Desc: Above all, we believe in creating impact—where collaboration leads to sustainable development, stronger industries, and a shared economic future for both nations.

visionPage.title: Vision & Mission
visionPage.subtitle: Fostering economic synergy, bridging cultural divides, and industrializing innovations from the ground up.
visionPage.visionDesc: To create a collaborative future where Japan and India stand together as global leaders in technology, industry, and sustainable growth.
visionPage.missionDesc: To drive meaningful partnerships and industrial progress by providing expert market entry support, fostering cross-border collaboration, and delivering world-class innovation incubation for businesses and governments.
visionPage.pillar1Desc: Bud innovations from scratch and then facilitate them in global expansions.
visionPage.pillar2Desc: Break the cultural differences between two nations to build trust.
visionPage.pillar3Desc: Promote trade, joint ventures, and localization opportunities between both ecosystems.

careersPage.title: Careers at JIBB
careersPage.subtitle: Building the future of the Tokyo–Noida industrial corridor.
careersPage.intro: At the Japan India Business Bureau (JIBB), we are building a team that thrives at the intersection of two of the world’s most dynamic economies. If you are curious, driven, and excited about cross-border collaboration, JIBB offers a platform where your work directly contributes to shaping India–Japan business relationships.
careersPage.subtext: We work closely with global companies, government stakeholders, and industry leaders across sectors like semiconductors, electronics, infrastructure, pharmaceuticals, and emerging technologies. Here, you don’t just take up a role, you become part of building something impactful from the ground up.
careersPage.whyJoin1: Work on real cross-border business projects between India and Japan
careersPage.whyJoin2: Exposure to high-growth sectors like semiconductors, EV, and advanced manufacturing
careersPage.whyJoin3: Opportunity to interact with global stakeholders and decision-makers
careersPage.whyJoin4: A fast-paced environment where ideas are encouraged and ownership is valued
careersPage.whyJoin5: Be part of building an organization from the ground up
careersPage.applyDesc: If you’re interested in any of the above roles, please share your resume along with a short note on why you’d like to work with JIBB at hitesh@npo-jibb.org and fill out the form below.

form.successDesc: Thank you for applying. We have received your details and our team will get in touch with you shortly.
form.emailErrorText: Email service is facing some problems. Please try again after some time or directly write to

consultant.title: Consultant
consultant.overview: As a Consultant, you will work closely with member organizations to understand industries, identify opportunities, and support strategic decision-making across India and Japan.
responsibilities: Conduct market research, industry analysis, and assessment of opportunities
Prepare industry reports, newsletters, and market forecasts
Support go-to-market strategy development for cross-border expansion
Identify potential partners, technologies, and business opportunities
Work closely with stakeholders across private and public sectors
requirements: Background in BTech with experience in consulting or KPO environments
Ability to understand both technical and business perspectives

translator.title: Translator (Japanese Language)
translator.qual: Graduate with proficiency in Japanese, Hindi, and English
translator.overview: You will play a key role in bridging communication between Indian and Japanese stakeholders, ensuring smooth and effective cross-border interactions.
responsibilities: Support verbal communication between Japanese and Indian teams
Assist in meetings, discussions, and technical coordination
Help overcome language and cultural barriers in business interactions
Support internal and external translation/communication requests
requirements: Strong verbal proficiency in Japanese (N3/N2 or higher preferred), Hindi, and English
Written proficiency in Japanese is an added advantage

bde.title: Business Development Executive
bde.overview: As a Business Development Executive, you will help expand JIBB’s network by engaging with companies, identifying opportunities, and driving memberships and collaborations.
responsibilities: Identify and engage potential members and corporate partners
Track innovations, challenges, and trends in electronics and semiconductors
Connect with decision-makers across Indian and Japanese companies
Present JIBB offerings and propose relevant bilateral solutions
Support growth of memberships and strategic collaborations
requirements: Strong understanding of electronics, electrical engineering, or semiconductor value chains
Excellent communication, outreach, and presentation skills
Interest in international business development and cross-border collaboration

leadershipPage.intro: Meet the directors, advisors, and ground experts who steer the Tokyo-Noida corridor.

approachPage.title: Our Approach
approachPage.subtitle: Bridging India and Japan through structured methodologies, deep trust, and local execution.
approachPage.introHeadline: A Methodology Built on Trust & Execution
approachPage.introPara1: Successful cross-border collaboration requires more than just formal connections. It demands a deep understanding of cultural nuances, local regulatory environments, and target market conditions.
approachPage.introPara2: At JIBB, we have developed a proven, three-step methodology that guides businesses and startups from their first introduction through physical office establishment and sustained scaling in both Japan and India.
approachPage.connectDesc: We identify and bring together the right stakeholders, from leading technology firms in Tokyo to high-growth startups and manufacturing networks in Noida.
approachPage.facilitateDesc: We simplify the complexities of market entry, handling regulatory compliance, company registration, translation services, and joint-venture negotiations.
approachPage.enableDesc: We support long-term development through our physical Innovation Hubs, dedicated corporate mentoring, investor access, and ongoing policy advocacy.
approachPage.ctaTitle: Ready to Start Your Bilateral Journey?
approachPage.ctaDesc: Partner with JIBB to access exclusive insights, sandbox laboratories, and a pre-screened business network across the Tokyo–Noida corridor.
